system.description:
The Wise have a special role in low-magic settings, whether mundane priest, feared forest warlock, or sacred oracle. Their limited powers are normally viable only where standard magic is absent or rare. Benefits of the Wise. The Wise is a partial Expert class taken with another partial class. It does not gain Quick Learner or the normal first-level bonus non-combat Focus, though a standard Partial Expert partner provides those perks. All Wise gain a level-0 bonus skill appropriate to their concept. They do not use Effort; their abilities are constant or usable under stated circumstances or daily limits. Abilities are generally fixed by concept and role, with occasional choices.
